seo.title: Easy With Marinda - Kevin Leo - Marinda Kook

html:
This week I cooked with my little Pavarotti. I honestly don't know who enjoyed it more, me or Kevin Leo.

In one's life there are people around whom you can be carefree and simply yourself. They let you be who you are. Kevin Leo is one such person. We had so much fun in the kitchen that the word cooking took on a whole new meaning. There was laughing, dancing and singing. Kevin even gave us an “extract” and I ended up with his trousers over my shoulder. What a show! What a man! Kevin Leo, I salute you!

Tune in Thursday at 17:30 on VIA, channel 147 for this special episode.
